feat.name: Primal Howl
feat.text:
Your companion can let out a howl laced with your primal magic. It gains the following advanced maneuver, in addition to any advanced maneuvers it already knows.   
  
**Primal Howl** (primal, sonic)

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

feat.effect: Your animal companion screeches and howls, empowered with natural magic. All creatures in a 30-foot cone take 1d6 sonic damage for every 2 levels your companion has, with a basic Fortitude save against your spell DC. Creatures that fail become frightened 1, and creatures that critically fail become frightened 2. The fright is an emotion, fear, and mental effect.
